name: Anthemis Digital Acquisitions I Corp Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Anthemis Digital Acquisitions I Corp is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus its search on businesses operating in the financial technology and related sectors. Anthemis Digital Acquisitions I Corp. is based in New York, NY.
